benefits.description: Lost from 260 lbs to 190 lbs over 2 years. Recently increased dose to 20mg/week and reached 190 lbs after plateauing at this weight for 6 months.

protocol_notes: On tirzepatide for 2 years. Previously tried retatrutide without success. Plans to cruise at 10-15mg/week for life after tapering down. Notes that retatrutide and tirzepatide overlap in mechanism and are not a good combination; recommends cagrilintide as supplement.
